'''Malcom''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed [[Brema sector/Legends|Brema sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
Malcom struggled to halt the spread of [[Pinacism]], a religion, throughout his sector.
